title: UX Library
intro: Production-ready navigation UI for Android — fully themeable, OEM-customisable, built on NavSDK.

what.heading: What is UX Library?
what.body1: UX Library is TomTom's customisation layer for navigation applications. It sits between NavSDK (the routing, map rendering and positioning engine) and the OEM application, providing production-ready UI components, design tokens, and a stable API surface for tailoring every visible aspect of the navigation experience.
what.body2: OEMs get a coherent, ANA-consistent baseline out of the box. From there, every layer is overridable — colours, typography, layout, component structure, and even core functional components like the search engine — without forking or maintaining a parallel UI codebase.

map.title: Map as wallpaper
map.body: The navigation map fills the entire IVI home screen as a persistent background layer.

theme.title: Full theming
theme.body: Override any design token — colour, radius, typography — to match OEM brand guidelines.

modules.title: Replaceable modules
modules.body: Swap search, voice, or routing providers without changing any UI code.

layouts.title: Composable layouts
layouts.body: Resize the navigation area from any edge. Other domain widgets layer on top.

useCases.heading: Key use cases
useCases.subheading: The most commonly customised capabilities — click any card to jump straight to the documentation.

homeScreenLayout.label: Home Screen Layout
homeScreenLayout.desc: Map as wallpaper, application area sizing, and UI state signals for navigation zones.

etaPanel.label: ETA Panel
etaPanel.desc: Configure position, content fields, and theming for the arrival estimate panel.

searchEngine.label: Search Engine
searchEngine.desc: Replace the search provider, configure connectivity transitions, and enrich the search UI.

theming.label: Theming
theming.desc: Apply OEM brand tokens — colour, typography, corner radius — across all navigation UI components.

instructionPanel.label: Instruction Panel
instructionPanel.desc: Style the next-turn banner during active navigation — position, colour, icon size, and street-name truncation.

routeBar.label: Route Bar
routeBar.desc: Customise the route progress bar, waypoint chips, and traffic severity summary shown during guidance.

evChargingSearch.label: Charging Search
evChargingSearch.desc: Discover compatible EV stations filtered by connector type, power level, and preferred charging networks.

evRouting.label: Long-Distance EV Routing
evRouting.desc: Plan multi-stop journeys with automatic charging breaks and interactive SoC threshold tuning.

evNavUI.label: EV In-Navigation UI
evNavUI.desc: SoC strip, reachable range ring, horizon stop countdown, and low-battery re-routing overlay during guidance.

cluster.label: Displaying on Cluster
cluster.desc: Render NIP, lane guidance, CMP, and ETA on the vehicle instrument cluster via intent.

hud.label: Head-Up Display
hud.desc: Project speed, manoeuvre arrows, and street names onto an automotive HUD from the navigation stack.

aiPersonality.label: Conversation Personality
aiPersonality.desc: Customise the AI assistant's name, tone, and branded phrases for a distinct OEM voice identity.

intentRouting.label: Intent Routing
intentRouting.desc: Route navigation intents through TAIA and forward media, climate, and phone intents to OEM domain handlers.

voiceEngine.label: Voice Engine
voiceEngine.desc: Connect your OEM text-to-speech provider to drive all voice output from the AI assistant.

speechToText.label: Speech to Text
speechToText.desc: Integrate a speech-to-text provider and configure wake word handling for hands-free voice input.

adas.label: ADAS Integration
adas.desc: Connect advanced driver assistance systems — lane guidance, speed alerts, and junction view.

explore.heading: Explore by domain
explore.subheading: Six integration domains — click any card to explore all pages within that domain.

assets.label: Design System
assets.desc: Design tokens, colour palettes, typography, icons, and corner radius — the OEM theming foundation.

mapCustomisation.label: Map Customisation
mapCustomisation.desc: Map style variants, traffic overlay, safety camera zones, route styling, and custom map markers.

appCustomisation.label: App Customisation
appCustomisation.desc: Home screen layout, search engine integration, navigation panel positioning, and guidance UI panels.

evCharging.label: EV & Charging
evCharging.desc: Battery model configuration, charging station search, long-distance route planning, and in-navigation SoC UI.

vehicleIntegration.label: Vehicle Integration
vehicleIntegration.desc: Instrument cluster, head-up display, ADAS lane guidance integration, and truck routing constraints.

aiAssistant.label: TomTom AI Assistant
aiAssistant.desc: Cloud AI agent for in-vehicle voice — speech recognition, intent routing, TTS, and multi-turn dialogue.

ev.label: EV Support
ev.desc: Range-aware routing, charging station search, and automatic stop planning.

cluster.label: Displaying on Cluster
cluster.desc: Render NIP, lane guidance, CMP, and ETA on the vehicle instrument cluster via intent.

search-engine.label: Search engine
search-engine.desc: Replace the search provider, connectivity transitions & UI enrichment.

nav-controls.label: Navigation Controls
nav-controls.desc: Button bar position, visibility & search entry point configuration.

ai-overview.label: TomTom AI Assistant
ai-overview.desc: Cloud AI agent for voice navigation — STT, TTS, intent understanding.

horizon-panel.label: Horizon Panel
horizon-panel.desc: Compose or decompose the guidance panel into NIP, Upcoming Events & ETA.

colour.label: Colour
colour.desc: Global palettes, system tokens & semantic colour definitions.

home-screen-layout.label: Home Screen Layout
home-screen-layout.desc: Map as wallpaper, application area sizing & UI state signals.

colour.desc: Global palettes, system tokens & semantic definitions

corner-radius.desc: Radius scale from null (0dp) through to full (50%)

home-screen-layout.label: Home Screen Layout
home-screen-layout.desc: Map as wallpaper, application area sizing & UI state signals

horizon-panel.desc: Compose or decompose the guidance panel into NIP, Upcoming Events & ETA

instruction-panel.label: Next Instruction Panel

callout: This is a prototype. Pages with full interactive content are Colour, Design Tokens, Font, Corner radius, Home Screen Layout, Search engine, Navigation Controls, Horizon Panel, Next Instruction Panel, ETA Panel, Route Bar, TomTom AI Assistant, and EV Support. All other nav items are placeholders to be built out.
